title: GeneralRankingOutputContract
description: Data contract for General Ranking output. Separate from the General Foundation contract.

ranking_universe_modes.PASS_ONLY: Default. Only clusters where structure_gate == PASS.
ranking_universe_modes.PASS_PLUS_REVIEW: Debug mode. Clusters where structure_gate in [PASS, REVIEW].

strict_prohibitions: Do NOT append ranking fields to foundation_structure_results.json
Do NOT implement PV, heat pump, or bundle logic in this module
Do NOT use probability language in ranking reasons
Do NOT redefine Foundation gate thresholds
